modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error encountered during Respondus Lockdown Browser installation.

full_description_text: The user attempted to install the latest version of Respondus Lockdown Browser on their system. During the installation process, an error occurred stating that the institution ID could not be stored in the registry, which prevented the installation from completing successfully. This issue affects users on various operating systems, including Windows, MacOS, and Chromebook.
short_description: Error encountered during Respondus Lockdown Browser installation.
description: The user attempted to install the latest version of Respondus Lockdown Browser on their system. During the installation process, an error occurred stating that the institution ID could not be stored in the registry, which prevented the installation from completing successfully. This issue affects users on various operating systems, including Windows, MacOS, and Chromebook.
